focus: update-docs skill — new command and documentation
summary: Added /update-docs skill — a session-aware command that reads a documentation maintenance guide and updates the relevant docs based on changes made in the current conversation, requiring only the guide path as an argument.

focus: create-docs skill — new command and documentation
summary: Added /create-docs skill — a plan-generating command that inventories a codebase, classifies documentation gaps, and produces a session-driven plan folder (EXECUTE.md + 03-documentation-sessions.md) for creating all missing docs across many conversations using the Single-Session Principle.

Created complete initial documentation structure for claude-kit covering all three skills (commit, plan, daily-update), getting started guide, workflow patterns, and the full doc-maintenance system including sync guide and progress tracker.
